rationale: CCC Domain C ("Human-AI Curriculum Collaboration") and UNESCO AI CFT 3.1 ("Basic AI techniques and applications", the Acquire-level competency block for Dimension 3) both concern understanding and appropriately using AI tools. UNESCO 3.1 is general-purpose (any AI tool in any teaching context); CCC Domain C narrows this to the specific task of collaborating with AI on curriculum-interpretation work (evaluating AI-suggested alignments, guiding AI toward curriculum tasks, identifying AI biases in curriculum data). relatedMatch, not narrowMatch, because CCC Domain C also draws on UNESCO's Dimension 1 (Human-centred mindset -- see OE-ALIGN-000010) and is not reducible to a narrower reading of Dimension 3 alone.
subject: CCC-v1.0.0:OE-COMPETENCY-001010
